oneOf.description: If set to true, the block will have the default destroy time. If set to false, this block is indestructible by mining.

oneOf.title: Destructible by Mining
oneOf.description: Describes the destructible by mining properties for this block.

seconds_to_destroy.description: Sets the number of seconds it takes to destroy the block with base equipment. Greater numbers result in greater mining times.

item_specific_speeds.description: Optional array of objects to describe item specific block destroy speeds, each object contains an 'item' ItemDescriptor and a 'destroy_speed' float.

item.description: A filter for the item used while mining.

tags.description: A condition using Molang queries that the item must satisfy.

destroy_speed.description: A destroy speed applied while using the defined 'item'.
